sources.title: Never Steal Money From A Killer | Full Movie | Action Crime | Daniel Baldwin | Bring Him Back Dead
sources.description:
*Bring Him Back Dead* - Following a failed heist, a vicious crew of thieves is instructed to find and kill the traitor who stole their riches. Louis Mandylor portrays the gang's leader, Gary Daniels the "anti-hero," and Daniel Baldwin a character with enigmatic motivations. 
2022. Stars: Louis Mandylor, Daniel Baldwin, Gary Daniels
